plugin.name: Safe Default (Recommended)
plugin.description: Archive-only synchronous read policy. Warm cache and DirectStorage probing are disabled. Recommended for normal play and long-term saves.

plugin.name: Minimal Compatibility
plugin.description: Archive-only hook with all process, hardware, warm-cache, and DirectStorage extras disabled. Use when isolating compatibility problems.

plugin.name: Experimental Bounded Warm Cache
plugin.description: Safe archive hook plus an opt-in 512 MB, one-thread prefetch after 60 seconds. Benchmark before keeping it.

plugin.name: Do not bundle runtime (Recommended)
plugin.description: DirectStorage is not required for the normal Windows file-cache policy and probing ships disabled.

plugin.name: Install DirectStorage 1.3 runtime
plugin.description: Advanced testing only. The runtime remains inactive unless both bDirectStorageProbe and bDirectStorageWarmRead are manually enabled.
